programs.title: Killing Season
programs.desc: Two war veterans (Robert De Niro, John Travolta) play cat-and-mouse games in the remote wilderness.

programs.title: Cold Blood Legacy
programs.desc: A legendary hit man's quiet life is interrupted by the arrival of a woman with serious injuries.

programs.title: Blood and Money
programs.desc: A hunter discovers a dead woman with a bag of money and finds himself in a web of deceit and murder.

programs.title: Sugar Mountain
programs.desc: A young man fakes his disappearance in the Alaskan wilderness to trick a thug who's after him.

programs.title: Lavalantula
programs.desc: Volcanic eruptions in Los Angeles unleash a swarm of gigantic, lava-breathing tarantulas.

programs.title: Volcano
programs.desc: A Los Angeles emergency official takes charge when earthquakes and erupting lava ravage the city.
